infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Lunan to use your location to center the map and tag the places you save.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Lunan to use your camera so you can snap a photo for a place.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Lunan to access your photos so you can attach one to a place.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Lunan to use your location to center the map and tag the places you save.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Lunan to access your photos so you can attach one to a place.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Lunan to use your camera so you can snap a photo for a place.
